description_long: This apple is medium-sized with a round, slightly asymmetrical shape and a gentle taper toward the base. Its skin displays a blend of red and yellow hues, with the red being more dominant and streaked across the surface. The apple's surface is smooth and semi-glossy, with subtle speckling and natural color gradients typical of fresh apples. A short, brown stem protrudes from the top, set in a shallow dimple. The skin appears unbroken and free from visible blemishes or damage. The overall appearance suggests a fresh, ripe apple suitable for eating or display in an urban environment.
description: A round, red-yellow apple with a smooth, semi-glossy skin and a short brown stem.
description_view_0: Mostly yellow with red streaks, stem visible at top center.
description_view_1: Redder side with some yellow, stem angled slightly to the left.
description_view_2: Predominantly red surface, stem visible, less yellow than other views.
description_view_3: Balanced red and yellow coloration, stem slightly off-center.
